description: Style NoteTonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a spread collar and a split neckline, this navy blue lace top has three quarter sleeves with mid buttoned tabs and a full buttoned placketMaterial and CareShell 90% nylon and 10% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
